TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-frog5__awi_ a basi_

S.FORM: kita'en koSa'en ka manabih ka inoka a takem a.
S.TRANSL: 我要說關於一隻青蛙的故事。
"I will tell a story about a frog."

S.FORM: kinbazaen hini 'aehae' koSa'en ka a korkoring 'aehoe' 'aehae'.
S.TRANSL: 這個故事是關於一隻狗和一個小孩。
"This story about a child and a dog."

S.FORM: a rakepen takem.
lobih ray a taew'an.
sepanen ray tabai.
S.TRANSL: "(They) kept it in a jar to raise."

S.FORM: hayza' mwa:i' isaa 'aehae' hahila.
koSa'en ka a takem raiw ila.
korkoring haysia ma'rem ray a halapaw.
S.TRANSL: "The child was still asleep on his bed."

S.FORM: raiw ila ka a takem.
hini korkoring ki 'aehoe' ma a ki:im ila.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗跑去找那隻青蛙。
"The child and the dog went to look for the frog."

S.FORM: ki:im ilakano' 'inoka' ila ray atabai koSa'en sinpanan.
S.TRANSL: 他們找原來在甕裡的青蛙。
"They looked for the frog which was in the jar."

S.FORM: mwa:i' 'am ki:im.
S.TRANSL: "The boy came to look for the frog."

S.FORM: e noka a korkoring panpanibih ila ray a kakrangi'an.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在他的東西之間四處翻找。

S.FORM: koSa'en ka haehoeway sipan'oe'ong ma' a 'oka' i: kita'i.
S.TRANSL: 小孩把他的鞋倒過來，但是找不到青蛙。
"The child turned his shoes upside down, but he couldn't find (the frog)."

S.FORM: a noka ahoe' ray tabai ki:imin ma' 'oka'.
S.TRANSL: 狗找甕的裡面，青蛙不在那裡。
"The dog looked inside the jar. The frog was not there too."

S.FORM: ra hini' 'aehae' korkoring kosaen ray hinoehas.
ilahao latar si'oe'oe ila.
si'oe'oe no'ano' a takem 'am ra:am koSa'en ka 'a 'oe'oewan o:.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙認不認得那個聲音（在叫牠）？
"Would the frog know the sound (calling it)?"

S.FORM: 'inokay mwa:i' a si'oe'oe isahini 'aehae' koSa'en ka 'aehoe' twa'is kikozah ray tabai.
S.TRANSL: "The dog forced itself toward the jar."

S.FORM: o: noka 'aehoe' a ta'oeloeh sikosiza ila o: ray tabai 'izo'.
S.TRANSL: "The dog inserted its head into the jar."

S.FORM: moiti' ki:im ila hini.
S.TRANSL: 狗讓自己進到甕裡面找青蛙。
"The dog got itself into the jar to look for the frog there."

S.FORM: 'aehoe' noka a korkoring isaa ma 'aewpoe'oen ila.
'aewpoe'oen ma 'ima koSa:.
a taila taki:im.
S.TRANSL: "Let's go and look for the frog."

S.FORM: a takem 'am mwa:i' 'am mwa:i' taew'an langi' si'oe'oe.
S.TRANSL: 孩子跑出去房子外面叫。
"The boy went out of the house and called."

S.FORM: 'aehoe' ma' hinghae'.
si'oe'oe ma' 'oka' i: kita'i.
S.TRANSL: 他們叫啊叫，但是沒有看到青蛙出來。
"They called and called but did not see the frog come out."

S.FORM: kas'oehaz sa'oewaz korkoring mwa:i' ray hoeroe a noka 'aewhaes a.
S.TRANSL: "The boy came to the mouse hole."

S.FORM: ka 'aehoe' sahoeroe sahoeroe boya'.
isaa tbong nakhini koSa'en ka a boya'.
si'oe'oe si'oe'oe noka korkoring.
kas'oehaz kitaen mwa:i' ka 'aewhaes.
ra ka korkoring nakhara ila homses sowiti'.
hini ka 'aehoe' 'ima hahlihin ka a kaehoey.
S.TRANSL: "The dog was pushing and shaking the tree."

S.FORM: isahiza ka boya' paksahae'en ray ra:i' ka'ina'an hayap.
S.TRANSL: 那些掉在地上的蜂飛走了。
"The bees falling on the ground flew away."

S.FORM: hini' ka 'aewhaes kas'oehaz payrarongaw.
o: korkoring 'akmi:im ka takem noka komoSa: ray kaehoey babaw.
S.TRANSL: "The child looked for the frog up the tree."

S.FORM: hayza nak 'osa'an ka a roroo'.
S.TRANSL: 有東西進去（樹上）腐壞的樹洞。

S.FORM: rima' payrarongaw ray a roroo'.
S.TRANSL: "He went to peek inside the hole."

S.FORM: kita' si'oe'oei.
hiza ray a roroo' 'izo' mina kano'.
ka kal'oe kal'oe kas'oehaz.
ka hiza korkoring homses.
sahae' ila hani ray ra:i'.
'aehoe' 'ima a raiw hino boya'.
S.TRANSL: "The dog ran away from the bees chasing it."

S.FORM: sowawon ma isa may isason ray kaehoey pingi'.
S.TRANSL: 他們跑著離開經過那棵樹。
"They ran away passing under the tree."

S.FORM: ma ra:iw nokosizah ila o: ray 'ima ra:awaSen sowiti.
S.TRANSL: 當他們已經跑得很遠了，

S.FORM: 'am mwa:i' nak hini.
ka a korkoring min'itol ila miriri:i'.
hiza ka kal'oe hayap.
nakhara iya kosa' kinoring ka a korkoring.
S.TRANSL: 好像是牠在攻擊那個小孩。
"It seemed like it's attacking the child."

S.FORM: sa'oewaz korkoring ma' tikot 'atomalan.
tay'itol a ray ka bato' babaw 'oe'oe nakhini koSa'en ka a takem.
S.TRANSL: 小孩爬到石頭上面叫青蛙。
"The child climbed on top of the rock calling the frog."

S.FORM: ka 'aehoe' isaa maStaba ila ray a bato' langi.
S.TRANSL: "The dog lay down beside the rock."

S.FORM: may isaa tilhaehael hiya' a ki:im ka a takem sa'oewaz.
S.TRANSL: "Who passed by there to look for the frog?"

S.FORM: sa mwa:i' rini ray a bato' babaw.
S.TRANSL: "And came on top of the rock."

S.FORM: kas'oehaz 'aehae' nakhini koSa'en ka a wae'ae'.
a wae'ae' isahiza ka a korkoring ma' pahangal ila noka a wae'ae'.
rima' wae'ae kah'oeng hiza pahalay.
'ima noka 'aehoe' a sia sowaw.
isahiza wae'ae' 'ae'ae:aew ila ila hiza ray 'ima mwahil.
S.TRANSL: 鹿朝著一個寬闊的地方跑去。
"The deer ran away toward a spacious area there."

S.FORM: 'aehoe' ma' hinghae' sowaw 'oyae' mwa:i' ila ray iniya a ka'siyap.
S.TRANSL: "The dog also chased along and came to a cliff."

M.TRANSL: 第一人稱複數排除予格

S.FORM: ka 'aehoe' sahae' ila.
ka wae'ae' si'intani'.
S.TRANSL: 鹿停下來 （並且避免狗跳上去）。
"The deer stopped (and prevented the dog from bumping into it)."

S.FORM: hiza ka a korkoring ma' sahae' ila sa'oewaz sahae' ila isaa o: ray 'ima 'izo' ka hinolaong(an).
S.TRANSL: "The child also fell into a shady spot."

S.FORM: 'inaray hinolaw langi hayza ka kaehoey sa korkoring sahae' ila ila haw ray hinolaong(an) ki ahoe'.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和他的狗一起掉下去到蔭涼處。
"The child fell into a shady area together with his dog."

S.FORM: wae'ae' 'inaray babaw ma a saze:ez kitkita' sa'oewaz nakhini kosaen ka.
S.TRANSL: "The deer looked carefully from the top."

S.FORM: a korkoring ki e 'aehoe' hiza korkoring ra:am ma' a lalangoy.
S.TRANSL: "The child and the dog knew how to swim."

S.FORM: ma masa:eng isaa 'aehoe' may isaa ta'itol ila ray a korkoring a ka a a'ba:a' babaw sa'oewaz.
S.TRANSL: 那狗坐下，並爬上小孩的肩膀。
"The dog sat down and climbed on top of the child's shoulder."

S.FORM: moehae'oe mwa:i' nakhara maybih ila koSa:.
S.TRANSL: 牠下來並且很後悔,並且說，
"It came down and regretted it. And said,"

S.FORM: wa a nak'ino'an ila.
mwa:i' koSa'en ray hinolaong langi'.
S.TRANSL: 他們來到蔭涼的這一邊。
"They came to the side of a shady spot."

S.FORM: kita'en ila hiza ka 'ataba:i isa hiza 'aehoe' a ma lalangoy nakhara tbong.
isaa noka a korkoring koSa'en 'iyahimi'.
S.TRANSL: "The child told the dog to be quiet."

S.FORM: 'izik tobong.
ta'itol lasia nakhini koSa'en ka 'ataba:i babaw.
S.TRANSL: 他們（爬）上那木頭的頂端。
"They climbed on top of a dead wood."

S.FORM: rima' moehae'oe isaa ki:im ka a takem.
S.TRANSL: "The child looked down to look for the frog."

S.FORM: mwa:i' sa'oewaz kitaen ila ray 'ataba:i hikor ka takem roSa'.
S.TRANSL: 他看到兩隻青蛙在那塊木頭後面。
"He saw two frogs behind the dead piece of wood."

S.FORM: hiza 'aehoe' iya iyanoa' 'aehoe' ki ki korkoring.
S.TRANSL: "What's wrong with the dog and the child?"

S.FORM: mwa:i' kabih naehaen langi.
'akoy 'atomalan ila kitaen ka a takem.
lasia isaa masa:eng ri'saon naehaen ray 'ataba:i babaw.
S.TRANSL: 牠們坐在那塊木頭上面。
"They were sitting on top of the dead piece of wood."

S.FORM: isahini ka a korkoring ma a rakep tasihoeroe ila naehaen kayzaeh ka a takem.
S.TRANSL: 現在小孩捉 ... .找到他的青蛙。
"Now the child caught... , found his frog."

S.FORM: hiza 'ima a langoy sowiti ray hinolaong.
S.TRANSL: 因此會有一些青蛙在那蔭涼處游泳。
"So there will be fewer frogs swimming in the shady area."

S.FORM: 'iya ralomen sa'oewaz ila isahiza ka a korkoring ma.
siska hiza 'ima haebae:aen naehaen koSa'en ka takem nakhara papil'awan ila.
S.TRANSL: "The child bade farewell to the group of frogs."

S.FORM: hayza ka hima' wilah sowiti ka hima'.
